violations.text: Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair milk coolers #3 and #4. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/03/2026
The floor in the dishwashing area was observed with cracks and is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 09/03/2026

Sliced deli meat and guacamole was observed thawing in stagnant water. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. Water was turned on in sink to allow for a continuous flow of water over the food items. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on milk coolers #1 and #3, and the 1-door freezer. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/08/2025

Bagged cheese sauce was not being reheated before being placed into hot holding. Cheese sauce was observed being held at 115 DF at the time of inspection. Cheese sauce was reheated to above 135 DF. Ready to eat foods taken from a commercially processed can or intact package from a food processing plant must be heated to at least 135 degrees Fahrenheit for hot holding. Proper reheating procedures reviewed with staff. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025
The gasket for milk chest #1 was in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 03/19/2025
The 3-bay sink water pipe was observed leaking at the time of inspection. Establishment must fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 03/12/2025

The floors under the equipment of the pizza station, and corners of cafeteria have an accumulation of soil residue, droppings, and/or food debris. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 03/05/2025

The presence of mice is not controlled as evidenced by droppings under the dry storage shelves, and under equipment at the burrito station. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Establishment must clean any and all droppings using proper methods of cleaning. Establishment is to continue working with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024
The gasket for milk chest #1 was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/15/2024
The food preparation sink was observed leaking into a container. Establishment is to fix leak. New Violation. Correct By: 10/15/2024

The presence of pest is not controlled as evidenced by droppings on the floor in the cafeteria and behind the equipment in the pizza station. The presence of insects, rodents, and other pests must be controlled by routinely inspecting the premises for evidence of pests, using acceptable methods to control pests, eliminating harborage conditions, and routinely inspecting incoming shipments of food and supplies. Corrective Action - Establishment must clean any and all droppings from the establishment using proper methods of cleaning. Establishment must continue to work with pest control. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2024

Refrigerator door gasket on the milk case were observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. The handle on the 1 door cooler in the pizza station was in poor repair, equipment must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/07/2024

The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was lacking paper towels. The establishment moved paper towels to the location. Corrective action - the paper towel dispenser above the 3 bay must be relocated to be by the hand sink. So the clean dishes will not be in a splash zone and the paper towel is more accessible. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 10/18/2023
Refrigerator door gasket on milk case 1 was observed in poor repair. Gaskets must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/18/2023
The floor in the cafeteria and pizza station are in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 04/18/2024

The cutting boards in the kitchen are very scratched and scored. Cutting blocks and boards that are subject to scratching and scoring shall be resurfaced if they can no longer be effectively cleaned and sanitized, or discarded if they are not capable of being resurfaced. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair. On Milk Cooler 2, and the Max Turbo Air. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023

The floors in the cafeteria area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. The floor by the dishwasher area is in poor repair. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023

By The window in the pizza station and behind equipment on the floor pizza area has an accumulation of soil residue, food debris and pest droppings. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 05/04/2023
